```bash
for url in \
  "https://www.wtatennis.com/players/316847/belinda-bencic" \
  "https://www.wtatennis.com/players/320760/belinda-bencic" \
  "https://www.wtatennis.com/players/320925/paula-badosa" \
  "https://www.wtatennis.com/players/326384/paula-badosa" \
  "https://www.wtatennis.com/players/328560/marta-kostyuk" \
  "https://www.wtatennis.com/players/331809/diana-shnaider"; do
  code=$(curl -sL -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" -A "Mozilla/5.0" "$url")
  echo "$code $url"
done
```

```bash

done
```

<summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: for id in 06VCqNeOK3Y 0wj2evG6Iro 5r-1kNgO5rQ 8XIqnjJEZ04 Byjj7ywDajU cG7vMmY4K0c DAxhqzDD68 EAz_0Ocg2dM; do

  title=$(echo &#34;$json&#34; | grep -oP &#39;&#34;title&#34;:&#34;\K[^&#34;]+&#39; | head -1)
  author=$(echo &#34;$json&#34; | grep -oP &#39;&#34;author_name&#34;:&#34;\K[^&#34;]+&#39; | head -1)

```bash
for id in 06VCqNeOK3Y 0wj2evG6Iro 5r-1kNgO5rQ 8XIqnjJEZ04 Byjj7ywDajU cG7vMmY4K0c DAxhqzDD68 EAz_0Ocg2dM; do
  json=$(curl -s "https://www.youtube.com/oembed?url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=$id&format=json" 2>/dev/null)
  title=$(echo "$json" | grep -oP '"title":"\K[^"]+' | head -1)
  author=$(echo "$json" | grep -oP '"author_name":"\K[^"]+' | head -1)
  if echo "$title" | grep -iq "kostyuk\|eala\|rome"; then
    echo "$id | $author | $title"
  fi
done
```

```bash
curl -sL -A "Mozilla/5.0" "https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=Marta+Kostyuk+Alexandra+Eala+Rome+2025+WTA+Match+Highlights" 2>/dev/null | grep -oP 'watch\?v=\K[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{11}' | sort -u | while read id; do
  json=$(curl -s "https://www.youtube.com/oembed?url=https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=$id&format=json" 2>/dev/null)
  title=$(echo "$json" | grep -oP '"title":"\K[^"]+' | head -1)
  author=$(echo "$json" | grep -oP '"author_name":"\K[^"]+' | head -1)
  echo "$id | $author | $title"
done | head -15
```
